posts.text:
BREAKING: The G7 countries have concluded their meeting on a potential 400 million barrel release from oil reserves.

France's Finance Minister says "we are not there yet" on a deal for a joint release of reserves.

Oil prices are surging toward $105/barrel on the news.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: At $117 oil, we can frac Mars and probably make the numbers work…🤣
